chain.thought: Explanation: The participant’s only 1st place finish was at the All-Africa Games (row 4). The last-place finishes (8th) were at the World Cross Country Championships (row 2) and the World Athletics Final (row 8). No single competition includes both a 1st and an 8th place.

judge_thought: Explanation: The only 1st-place finish is at the All-Africa Games. The lowest (last) placements listed are 8th at the World Cross Country Championships and the World Athletics Final. No single competition includes both a 1st-place and an 8th-place finish for the participant. Therefore, "none" is correct.
